name: vision-workshop
description: Interactive workshop presentations on computer vision and generative AI

scripts.install:all: cd diffusion && npm run install:all && cd ../filtering && npm run install:all && cd ../face-and-hand-tracking && npm run install:all && cd ../image-minipulation && npm run install:all
scripts.build: cd diffusion/frontend && npm install && npx cross-env VITE_BASE=/diffusion/ npm run build && cd ../../filtering/frontend && npm install && npx cross-env VITE_BASE=/filtering/ npm run build && cd ../../face-and-hand-tracking/frontend && npm install && npx cross-env VITE_BASE=/tracking/ npm run build && cd ../../image-minipulation/frontend && npm install && npx cross-env VITE_BASE=/image-manip/ npm run build
